post_topic: RAG pipelines are context injection systems, not just vector databases
image_description:
Single standalone diagram. One concept only. No panels, no grids, no collages. Full bleed 1080x1080px white background.

A horizontal left-to-right flow diagram titled 'RAG Is a Retrieval Pipeline — Not a Vector Database' in bold navy #0A0F1E at the top.

Six sequential nodes connected by rightward arrows, evenly spaced across the horizontal center of the canvas:

Node 1 (leftmost): Rounded rectangle labeled 'User Query' with a small text-input icon. Subtitle below: 'Natural language input'.

Arrow pointing right to Node 2: Rounded rectangle labeled 'Embedding Model' with a small transformer/neural net icon (e.g., OpenAI or Cohere logo placeholder). Subtitle: 'Query → Vector representation'. This node has a blue #5a96ff border highlight.

Arrow pointing right to Node 3: Rounded rectangle labeled 'Vector Database' with a database cylinder icon (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, or pgvector logo). Subtitle: 'ANN search → Candidate chunks'. Node border is standard navy.

Arrow pointing right to Node 4: Rounded rectangle labeled 'Reranker / Filter' with a funnel icon. Subtitle: 'Relevance scoring, deduplication'. This node has an amber #F5A623 border callout and a small amber badge reading 'Most skipped step'.

Arrow pointing right to Node 5: Rounded rectangle labeled 'Context Assembly' with a document-stack icon. Subtitle: 'Structured prompt payload injection'. Blue #5a96ff border highlight.

Arrow pointing right to Node 6 (rightmost): Rounded rectangle labeled 'LLM' with a small brain/chip icon. Subtitle: 'Reads context — does not search'. Standard navy border.

Arrow pointing right from Node 6 to a final output bubble labeled 'Response' in bold.

Below the flow, a single amber #F5A623 callout box spanning most of the canvas width, containing the text: 'Failure mode lives in steps 2–4. The LLM reflects what retrieval hands it.'

Navy #0A0F1E primary elements, blue #5a96ff highlights, amber #F5A623 callouts and important labels. Clean sans-serif font. Real cloud provider logos where relevant. Small text 'Kelvin Davis' bottom right corner. Professional LinkedIn infographic style similar to ByteByteGo. White background. No dark backgrounds.
